questions.questionText: What is the capital of India?
questions.explanationMarkdown:
**Exp) Option b is the correct answer.**
New Delhi is the capital of India.

explanations.markdown:
**Exp) Option b is the correct answer.**
New Delhi is the capital of India. It was made the capital in 1911 when the British shifted their capital from Kolkata.

**Exp) Option b is the correct answer.**
New Delhi is the capital of India. It is a union territory and serves as the seat of all three branches of the Government of India.

questions.questionText: What is the largest ocean on Earth?
questions.explanationMarkdown:
**Exp) Option c is the correct answer.**
The Pacific Ocean is the largest ocean on Earth.
